title: BetterFly
description:
Have flight like Bedrock version.
Players can type /flying to enable or disable the flying.
body:
It's a flight mod
Players can type
/flying
to enable or disable the flying
Have flight like Bedrock version.
No speed penalty for destroying blocks while flying.
Flight operations by modifying the player's Abilities
Multiplayer support.
NeoForge and Fabric are now supported!
